steps.title: Recognize that backsolving is the fastest method
steps.content: Since the answer choices are simple integers and fractions, testing them directly (backsolving) will be faster than using the quadratic formula. Start with a middle choice from the options.

steps.title: Test choice C by substitution
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice C (8): Substitute $x = 8$ into $5x^2 - 37x - 24$.

$$5(8)^2 - 37(8) - 24 = 5(64) - 296 - 24 = 320 - 296 - 24 = 0$$

The equation is satisfied. That matches choice C — C is correct.
